_comment: Conformance pass-rate thresholds for pg_ripple CI gates (v0.61.0 J7-4).
_doc: Each key maps a suite name to its minimum pass-rate (0.0-1.0). CI jobs fail if the actual rate drops below the threshold.

w3c_sparql11.description: W3C SPARQL 1.1 test suite (smoke subset required; full suite informational)

jena.description: Apache Jena ~1000 tests; non-blocking until >=95% pass rate achieved

watdiv.description: WatDiv 100 query templates; non-blocking correctness + performance

lubm.description: LUBM 14 OWL RL queries; required (all must pass)

owl2_rl.description: OWL 2 RL conformance; informational until >=95% pass rate

entailment_regimes.description: SPARQL Entailment Regime suite; informational in v0.61.0, blocking in v1.0.0
